BUILD.bazel.content:
"""Go library 'hook' -- generated by defn gen."""

load("@io_bazel_rules_go//go:def.bzl", "go_library")
load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file", "tagged_package")

go_library(
    name = "hook",
    srcs = ["main.go"],
    importpath = "github.com/defn/other/m/v/buildkite--agent/test/fixtures/hook",
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "main_go_fmt",
    src = "main.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "deps_cue_fmt",
    src = "deps.cue",
    tool = "cue",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "main_go_tag",
    src = "main.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "deps_cue_tag",
    src = "deps.cue",
    tags = [
        "cue",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_package(exclude = ["main.go", "BUILD.bazel", "deps.cue"])

un-shebanged.sh.content:
# shellcheck disable=all
echo "Hello world!"
echo "This is an un-shebanged script."

BUILD.bazel.content:
load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file", "tagged_file_glob")

tagged_file_glob(
    name = "fixture_tags",
    srcs = glob(["**"]),
    tags = ["source"],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)
